# Merge a Nuke Wiki

> Independent fan-made strategy wiki for Merge a Nuke on Roblox — not affiliated with Roblox Corporation or Nuke The Game.

Last updated: 2026-07-18

Working codes (June 2026): ATOMIC ($10,000 + 20 nukes), UPDATE2 ($10,000 + 10 nukes), BOOM ($5,000). Redeem: Shop (left) → scroll to bottom → enter code → Redeem. Upgrade Max Spawn before redeeming nuke-heavy codes. New players: merge same-level pairs (2+2=4) → buy Spawn Speed then Spawn Tier → lock base before raiding.

Codes and balance can change after Friday game updates. Tier names and some stats are community-reported — verify in the in-game Index.

## Primary guides

- [Wiki Home](https://mergeanuke.site/): Codes, beginner route, tier list, raid tips, and FAQ
- [Codes](https://mergeanuke.site/codes): Active codes, rewards, Max Spawn redeem tips, and step-by-step instructions
- [Beginner Guide](https://mergeanuke.site/beginner-guide): First steps, merge rules, and early mistakes to avoid
- [Upgrades](https://mergeanuke.site/upgrades): Store upgrade priority for free players
- [Progression](https://mergeanuke.site/progression): Rebirth 8 requirements (final Index tier, Overclocker, Barrier), stage-by-stage growth path, and reset checklist
- [Tier List](https://mergeanuke.site/tier-list): Merge levels and community-reported nuke names
- [Raid Guide](https://mergeanuke.site/raid): PvP raids, allies, wars, Contract Board, Volcano & Disco Admin Abuse, Town Square, Mystery Supply Drops, and Lock Base defense
- [Offline Cash](https://mergeanuke.site/offline-cash): Passive income and pre-logout setup
- [Commanders](https://mergeanuke.site/commanders): Full list of all 28 commanders with abilities and how to get each — Contract Board Diplomat, Advanced Warfare Pack, Overclocker/Barrier for Rebirth 8, tier lists, drop tables
- [Diplomat](https://mergeanuke.site/commanders/diplomat): Contract Board Unique Commander — Daily/Weekly/Monthly contracts, 14-day rotation
- [Welder](https://mergeanuke.site/commanders/welder): Common unit from the July 18, 2026 patch (ability pending)
- [Forklift Operator](https://mergeanuke.site/commanders/forklift-operator): Rare unit from the July 18, 2026 patch (ability pending)
- [Overclocker](https://mergeanuke.site/commanders/overclocker): How to get Overclocker on Oil Rig, Overclock ability, Rebirth 8 gate
- [Barrier](https://mergeanuke.site/commanders/barrier): How to get Barrier on Shipping Port, Rebirth 8 requirement (ability pending)
- [Artillery](https://mergeanuke.site/commanders/artillery): How to get Artillery on Downtown and Retaliation ability
- [Updates](https://mergeanuke.site/updates): Friday patch log — July 18 Contract Board & Volcano, July 13 Allies & Warfare, Commanders Pt. 2, July 4 LTM, Rebirth 8
- [FAQ](https://mergeanuke.site/faq): Rebirth, allies, Contract Board, code troubleshooting, and wiki scope

## Optional

- [Community](https://mergeanuke.site/community): Official Roblox game, tester application form, and About-tab links (group, Discord)
- [Blog](https://mergeanuke.site/blog): Sourced gameplay articles — tester applications, Rebirth 8 requirements, wars, commander cards
- [Privacy Policy](https://mergeanuke.site/privacy): Analytics, cookies, and data handling
- [Terms of Use](https://mergeanuke.site/terms): Fan-site disclaimer and liability limits
- [Contact](mailto:contact@mergeanuke.site): Questions or corrections about this wiki
